type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: For combustion, GHD calculated the total VOCs based on CAPP emissions factors and total fuel usage. For fugitives/venting, GHD used total gas released from LDAR report/vented gas calculations (as provided by TAQA) and average composition of all gas streams. For previous reporting years, speciation profiles and calculation methodologies could not be determined.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
Releases to water calculated based on the total produced water injected and the maximum solubility of each compound in water. This is a conservative estimate.

The increases in off-site disposal are due to the increases in total quantities disposed of to landfill.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: For combustion/flaring, GHD calculated emissions for each CAC based on the total gas combusted as provided by TAQA, the type of fuel used in each stream, the HHV of the each stream, the equipment-specific power ratings, operating hours and efficiencies, and published emission factors. For flaring and incineration, GHD calculated emissions for each CAC based on the total gas flared/incinerated, default destruction efficiencies, and default emission factors. For previous reporting years, the exact calculation methodologies used could not be determined.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: For combustion, emissions are calculated based on the calculated total quantities of each compound in the combusted/flared streams and CAPP-default destruction efficiencies. For fugitives/venting, GHD used total gas released from LDAR report/vented gas calculations (as provided by TAQA) and average composition of all gas streams. type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
GHD calculated the quantity released based on the measured composition of this compound in the produced water per the Brenntag analysis.  This was not previously reported. 

GHD calculated this quantity based on the quantity of material disposed to landfill, an assumption that 5% of the material disposed consisted of inlet condensate (which is a conservative estimate based on GHD's understanding of the disposed products), and the composition of H2S in the condensate. In previous reporting years, this methodology was followed with the exception that no H2S had been assumed to be in disposals.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: GHD calculated this quantity based on the quantity of material transferred off-site for treatment, an assumption that 5% of the material disposed consisted of inlet condensate (which is a conservative estimate based on GHD's understanding of the disposed products), and the composition of H2S in the condensate. In previous reporting years, this methodology was followed with the exception that no H2S had been assumed to be in materials sent for treatment.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: For combustion, GHD calculated emissions for each CAC based on the total gas combusted as provided by TAQA, the type of fuel used in each stream, the HHV of the each stream, the equipment-specific power ratings, operating hours and efficiencies, and published emission factors (acceptable for NPRI use). For flaring and incineration, GHD calculated emissions for each CAC based on the total gas flared/incinerated, default destruction efficiencies, and default emission factors. For fugitives/venting, GHD used total gas released from LDAR report/vented gas calculations (as provided by TAQA) and average composition of all gas streams. For previous reporting years, speciation profiles and exact methodologies could not be determined. For previous reporting years, speciation profiles and exact methodologies could not be determined.
